warnings: This index confirms house #5's (this house, บ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย 5) sanitary discipline set runs SN-01..SN-11 (11 sheets, drawing no. SN-58082), one sheet longer than houses #3/#4's 10-sheet SN-01..SN-10 sets -- the extra sheet is SN-07 'แปลนระบบสุขาภิบาลพื้นชั้นหลังคา' (roof-floor sanitary plan), inserted before the bathroom-detail sheet (which shifts from SN-07 in house #4 to SN-08 here), and every subsequent sheet number shifts by +1 accordingly (install-detail sheets 1/2 become SN-09/SN-10, hanger detail becomes SN-11). This matches the assigned 11-page range (48-58) one-to-one.
Page also contains two other tables (pipe type schedule, symbol legend) captured in sibling files.
All 11 index rows fully legible with high confidence; no blank/illegible rows.

Index table literally prints each drawing_ref as 'SN - 58082' (with spaces around the dash); normalized to 'SN-58082' to match the title block's own rendering and the convention used for houses #3/#4, consistent with how those houses' index rows were transcribed.
